name: king-sejong
description: Codex-native King Sejong skill and workflow adapter.

interface.shortDescription: Route Codex work through Sejong, Uigwe, and Seungjeongwon.
interface.longDescription: Plugin adapter for King Sejong hook metadata. Runtime wiring, durable docs, active context, and verification contracts remain installer-owned under the Codex user skill tree; use the canonical user-scope $sejong skill.
defaultPrompt: $sejong plan and execute this change with verification
$uigwe turn this direction into an execution contract
$seungjeongwon execute this approved scope and verify it
